tools.name: vera_rates
tools.description: Real-time LATAM central bank rates. Countries: CO, MX, BR, CL, PE. Returns FX rates, benchmark rates, inflation. $0.02 USDC via x402.

tools.name: vera_sanctions
tools.description: Global sanctions screening for LATAM operations. OFAC + UN + EU + UK (59k+ entries). Returns risk_score 0-1 + EU AI Act audit hash. $0.05 USDC via x402.

tools.name: vera_entity
tools.description: Company enrichment from LATAM public registries. RUES CO, CNPJ BR, RFC MX. Returns NIT/CNPJ, status, representative, industry. $0.03 USDC via x402.

tools.name: vera_context
tools.description: AI-powered LATAM market context. Sector + country → market_size, key_players, regulations, growth signals. $0.10 USDC via x402.
